kotlin-spring.name: performance
kotlin-spring.description: Performance review: complexity, blocking calls in reactive paths, N+1, hot-path allocations.

kotlin-spring.name: security
kotlin-spring.description: Security review: OWASP, secrets, payload redaction, unsafe deserialization, authz.

react.name: performance
react.description: Performance review: needless re-renders, missing memoization, effect/data-fetch waterfalls, bundle weight.

react.name: security
react.description: Security review: XSS / dangerouslySetInnerHTML, injection, secrets in client bundles, authz, dependency CVEs.

rust.name: performance
rust.description: Performance review: needless clones/allocations, blocking in async, N+1, hot-path overhead.

rust.name: security
rust.description: Security review: unsafe/UB, panics on untrusted input, injection, secrets, weak crypto, CVEs.

go.name: performance
go.description: Performance review: allocations, goroutine/resource leaks, blocking, N+1, hot-path overhead.

go.name: security
go.description: Security review: injection, panics on untrusted input, secrets, weak crypto, server hardening, CVEs.
